sections.paragraph:
Original: צמח

Transliteration: tsâmach

Phonetic: tsaw-makh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to sprout, spring up, grow up
    1. (Qal)
      1. to sprout, spring up
        1. of plants
        2. of hair
        3. of speech (figuratively)
    2. (Piel) to grow abundantly or thickly
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to grow
      2. to cause to sprout

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1928

Part(s) of speech: Verb
